privileged_info_summary: The mark_no_show task creates a synthetic patient named Robert Thornton with an appointment scheduled at 10:00 AM on the current date with provider 999998 (Dr. Sarah Chen) in the Oscar EMR system. The task requires marking this appointment with status code 'N' to indicate a no-show. All data is created synthetically during task setup via SQL INSERT statements into the Oscar EMR database (appointment and demographic tables). The expected appointment status after task completion is 'N', which the verifier checks as the primary success criterion.
